children.text: conduct metrology research on premise plumbing in relation to water safety, security, efficiency, sustainability, and resilience; and
coordinate research activities with academia, the private sector, nonprofit organizations, and other Federal agencies.

children.heading: Definitions
children.label: b Definitions
children.text: For purposes of this section, the term “premise plumbing” means the water distribution system located within the property lines of a property, including all buildings and permanent structures on such property. Such term includes building supply and distribution pipes, fixtures, fittings, water heaters, water-treating and water-using equipment, and all respective joints, connections, devices, and appurtenances.
